The Kaluhaburunghos oblongifolius, also known as the Kaluha tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. Research has shown that the Kaluha tree has various health benefits, including its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation due to its antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of the Kaluha tree include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the Kaluha tree is commonly used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues.
